name: Data Analytics Dashboard with AI Insights

values.content:
=Analyze this business data and provide insights:

KPIs:
- Total Revenue: ${{ $json.kpis.total_revenue }}
- Total Orders: {{ $json.kpis.total_orders }}
- Avg Order Value: ${{ $json.kpis.avg_order_value }}
- Conversion Rate: {{ $json.kpis.conversion_rate }}%
- Customer Acquisition Cost: ${{ $json.kpis.customer_acquisition_cost }}
- ROI: {{ $json.kpis.roi }}%

Return JSON with:
- trends (array of 3 key trends detected)
- anomalies (array of unusual patterns)
- insights (array of 5 actionable insights)
- recommendations (array of 3 strategic recommendations)
- forecast (predicted revenue for next week)
- risk_level (low, medium, high)
- executive_summary (2-3 sentence summary)

Return only JSON.

parameters.subject: =Weekly Analytics Report - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
